title: AdvancedBoiler
description: A client side mod to provide better performance with displays from the Boiler Plugin.
body:
# Warning
This is not a standalone mod. This is a client mod that requires [Boiler](https://modrinth.com/plugin/boiler) installed on the server.

# Requirements
- Simplevoicechat for audio playback
- OwOlib for config
- **VLC media player**

# Setup
1. install the mod and all its dependecies on your client.
2. install the Boiler plugin on your server.
3. Enable client support in the config.yml on the server
4. Open up port 8554 on your server. The rtsp streams will be published through that port.
